title: rubus brachystachys
intro: Rubus brachystachys, also known as the Dwarf Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to China. The medicinal properties of Rubus brachystachys include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus brachystachys include its potential to help reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. Rubus brachystachys can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
